## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New company added to portals/india.yml
- [ ] New mode or mode improvement
- [ ] New script
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## If adding a company to portals/india.yml
- [ ] Verified the ATS slug works (test with `npm run scan -- --board [ats]`)
- [ ] Added correct tier (1/2/3)
- [ ] Added domain

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this change
- [ ] No personal data (cv.md, profile.yml) is included
- [ ] The README is updated if needed
